posts.author: Helena_1 (Helena)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everybody, I’m a Monday.com newbie so still getting to grips with everything but already feeling the benefit! I have a quick query about editing an automation for sub-items: I need to add a couple more in but when i click on edit I just see the window below and cannot add/edit. Any suggestions to resolve? Thank you so much!

image2032×654 29.1 KB

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Helena_1

Duplicate the automation, make changes, save, delete original.
